rust_native_anchors.role: Axum API routes for /atelier/* over AtelierStore, including image import routes.
AtelierStore, reject_legacy_runtime_ref, event-family registry, pose/comfy module ownership.
Rust PoseKit data and receipt model translating legacy posekit core.mjs and poseDetection.worker.ts behavior.
Pose/OpenPose round-trip, detector status, sidecar, fallback, and JSONB preservation proofs.
Governed ComfyUI intake records, capability registration, output routing, fallback, dedup, workflow receipts, and job lifecycle.
Native CKC/Atelier side panel reading live Atelier backend and emitting drag payloads.
Native CKC media embeds through hsLink atom behavior.
Native CKC embed and Stage route proof.

preserved_behavior_anchors: Pose rig contract: OpenPose-style people[] payload with body-18 required, face-70 and hand-21 optional/zero-filled; JSONB round-trip preserves payload verbatim.
Detector boundary: MediaPipe/OpenPose keypoint detection runs out-of-module as a capability-gated Workflow-Engine job; Atelier stores governed data and receipts only.
No legacy runtime: no SQLite, Electron authority, localhost authority, sockets, process spawning, polling, direct LLM/model endpoints, or machine-local refs.
Head pose constraints: YXZ Euler to quaternion with yaw +/-90, pitch +/-75, roll +/-45.

Comfy bridge contract: workflow_json, prompt, seed, model, sampler, cfg, steps, filename_hint, character_id, bridge probes, capability registration, output routing, SaveImage fallback, dedup by workflow_run_id/content_hash, durable receipts.
CKC embed behavior: drag AtelierRef into rich editor inserts hsLink atom; route-to-Stage opens Stage pane; AccessKit IDs prove side panel and Stage surfaces.
original_app_evidence.evidence_gap: The original test app files were not found locally. Visual/behavioral overhaul must either locate them in a later MT or treat preserved Rust source comments/tests as the parity baseline.

next_mt_candidates.title: Original-app evidence recovery or parity-baseline decision

next_mt_candidates.title: Atelier collaboration parity investigation
